",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None:\\n        total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = steps_per_epoch * 12\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"With only 256 fixed training steps, the baseline effectively uses a near-constant LR and underutilizes the short budget.
